reference: Hello, my husband is twenty-eight years old and has been under some stress lately. Today he had a random weird moment where he took a breath and said that when he breathed, his chest developed this tingling pain. He said it has been happening off and on for a couple of years, and I was wondering what it could be.
text: Hello. My husband is 28 years old and has been under some stress lately. Today he had a random, weird moment where he took a breath and said that his chest developed this tingling pain. He said it has been happening off and on for a couple of years, and I was wondering what it could be.
